heading: ***FROST ADVISORY TONIGHT OUTSIDE THE CHAMPLAIN VALLEY & UPPER VALLEY***Today
text: Variable sun and clouds, more clouds midday and afternoon, with an isolated shower over the higher terrain north. Cool. Highs in the low to mid 50s north, 50s to low 60s in the Champlain Valley and south. Winds becoming west to northwest near 10 mph, a few gusts to 20 mph over the higher terrain, and through NH.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy this evening, then becoming mostly clear and chilly. Lows in the 30s, falling to 25 to 30 in the cold spots, with scattered to widespread frost. Winds northwest near 10 mph, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Tuesday
text: Mostly sunny and continued cool. Highs in the low to mid 50s north, 50s to near 60 in the Champlain Valley and south. Winds becoming northwest near 10 mph from the Green Mountains east, lighter to the west.
